description_long: This house features a light wood exterior with a prominent gray gable roof and two dormer windows on each long side. The front facade includes three large windows and a covered porch supported by wooden posts, with an attached staircase and deck on one side. The rear of the house has a spacious elevated deck with railings and a staircase leading down, as well as large windows that provide ample natural light. The structure is elevated on posts, suggesting it may be designed for areas prone to flooding or uneven terrain. The windows are symmetrically arranged, and the roofline is accentuated by multiple gables and dormers. The overall design is reminiscent of a Craftsman or Chalet style, blending rustic charm with functional outdoor spaces.
description: A light wood house with a gray gable roof, dormer windows, and large decks with railings and stairs. The structure is elevated on posts and features symmetrical window arrangements.
description_view_0: Front view showing three large windows, a covered porch with wooden posts, and the side deck with stairs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gable roof, a single window, and the depth of the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying two dormer windows, the long expanse of the roof, and the side deck.
description_view_3: Back view featuring a large deck with railings, stairs, and expansive windows opening onto the deck.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with dormers and large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with wooden posts, steps leading up, and a simple main door flanked by large windows
